user.title: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
user.description: Create one organized controller device for every physical TV, Chromecast, Cast speaker, or smart display. Use Configure after setup to review and merge duplicate physical-device representations.

abort.already_configured: Cast Metadata & TV Controls is already configured.

init.title: Controller configuration
init.description: Review physical devices first. You can define the full entity inventory for each device, merge duplicates, and override automatic providers only when needed.

review_groups.title: Detected physical devices

merge_devices.title: Merge duplicate physical devices
merge_devices.description: Select two or more controller devices that are actually the same television. The integration combines their underlying source entities, migrates their routes, applications, activities, linked entities and provider configuration, reloads, and removes obsolete duplicate devices.

merge_sources.title: Advanced native-source merge
merge_sources.description: Select every native media_player entity that belongs to one physical television. Do not select the Controller entity created by this integration.

edit_group.title: Edit a merged physical device
edit_group.description: Choose the manually merged physical device to rename or change.

edit_group_members.title: Edit merged physical device
edit_group_members.description: Add or remove native source entities. At least two source entities are required. Saving reloads the integration and cleans obsolete generated devices.

remove_group.title: Unmerge a physical device
remove_group.description: Remove a manual merge and return its native source entities to automatic physical-device matching. Group-specific routes, linked entities, command maps, app preferences, activities, timing, and Wake-on-LAN settings are removed.

clear_groups.title: Remove all manual device merges
clear_groups.description: All native source entities return to automatic matching after reload. Settings attached to manual groups are removed.

configure_device_entities.title: Configure physical device entities
configure_device_entities.description: Choose the physical controller whose complete Home Assistant entity inventory should be configured.

device_entities_group.title: Entities belonging to {name}
device_entities_group.description: Select every supported entity that represents this same physical device: all media players, remote entities, and restart buttons. The integration creates a persistent physical-device group and automatically chooses the best provider for each capability.

data.name: Physical device name
data.entities: Entities belonging to this physical device

configure_entity_providers.title: Override entity providers
configure_entity_providers.description: Choose a physical controller. Automatic selection is recommended; overrides are only needed when several linked entities can provide the same capability.

entity_provider_group.title: Entity providers for {name}
entity_provider_group.description: Select Automatic unless the integration cannot unambiguously choose among the entities configured for this physical device.

configure_remote_commands.title: Configure remote commands
configure_remote_commands.description: Choose a physical controller whose logical remote commands need provider-specific values.

remote_commands_group.title: Remote commands for {name}
remote_commands_group.description: The controller sends logical commands. Keep the default values when the linked remote accepts them; otherwise enter the exact command expected by that remote provider. Supported logical commands: {commands}.

configure_routes.title: Route controller capabilities
configure_routes.description: Choose the physical controller to configure.

route_group.title: Capability routing for {name}
route_group.description: Automatic is recommended. Select a specific native media-player entity only when one source is more reliable for that capability.

clear_routes.title: Clear all capability routes
clear_routes.description: Every controller will return to automatic source selection.

choose_app.title: Choose an application
choose_app.description: Select an automatically discovered, learned, or registered application.

edit_app.title: Application preferences
edit_app.description: Rename, hide, favourite, or reorder this application. Clear all custom values to return to automatic behaviour.

clear_app_preferences.title: Clear all app preferences
clear_app_preferences.description: Restore automatic names, visibility, favourites, and ordering.

timing_group.title: Command timing
timing_group.description: Increase delays only when the television is slow to leave Cast, confirm an app, or restart.

wol_group.title: Wake-on-LAN
wol_group.description: Used only when no native power-on capability is available. Clear the MAC address to disable it.

activity_group.title: Activity preset
activity_group.description: An activity powers on the device and can select an app/input, set volume, and set mute. Reusing a name replaces the existing activity.

error.two_devices_required: Select at least two different controller devices.
error.two_entities_required: Select at least two different native source entities.
error.media_player_required: Select at least one supported media_player entity.

abort.group_not_found: The selected physical device is no longer available.
abort.not_enough_devices: Only one physical device is currently detected, so there is nothing to merge.

group_members_missing.title: Source entities are missing from {name}
group_members_missing.description: The explicit physical-device group {name} has {count} missing source entities. Open the integration configuration and edit or remove the merged device.

route_source_missing.title: Capability routes are stale for {name}
route_source_missing.description: The following routed capabilities reference source entities that no longer exist: {capabilities}. Open the integration configuration and return them to Automatic or select replacement entities.
